text.title: langchain-observability Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for langchain-observability as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Adding LangSmith tracing only after a production incident occurs to "see what happened".
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Tracing captures execution at invocation time. Past runs without tracing cannot be reconstructed. Enable it from day one.

failure-mode.description: Running AgentExecutor with verbose=True in a production service behind an API.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: verbose=True prints internal reasoning steps to stdout, leaking intermediate agent state into application logs. Use callbacks for structured, filterable event capture instead.
